items.name: Firebrand Wings
items.description: You've got to be starting something.

items.name: Guardian of the Light Cape
items.description: You watch so they don't have to...

items.name: Totally Loaded Backpack
items.description: Everything but the science lab's sink!

items.name: Hybrid Wings - Lil Nas X (LNX)
items.description: Dark? Light? Why not both?

items.name: Cape of the Changing Moon
items.description: You’re one step closer into space.

items.name: Mothman Wings
items.description: Mothman is one of the most well-known cryptids in the world, not bad for one big bug.

items.name: Guardian Angel Wings
items.description: Pair of angel wings to wear on the back.

items.name: Butterfly Wings
items.description: Flying footloose and fancy-free!

items.name: LNX Backpack - Lil Nas X
items.description: Perfect for holding all your awards.

items.name: Astral Isle Backpack
items.description: Every Astral Isle Apprentice needs a bag of holding.

items.name: Royal Faerie Wings
items.description: "Swift as a shadow, short as any dream; / Brief as the lightning in the collied night."

items.name: Great Detective Cape
items.description: "It is my business to know what other people don't know."

items.name: Ready Player Two Backpack
items.description: For everything a gunter needs and more. Available as part of the Ready Player Two event.

items.name: Kitty Kat Backpack
items.description: What a purr-fect way to carry everything you need.

items.name: McLaren Racing Backpack
items.description: The MCL36. A stylish and vibrant McLaren Formula 1 car you can wear on your back.

items.name: Neon Gamer Backpack - KSI
items.description: Wear this Neon Backpack to store all your gamer gear!

items.name: Frozen Ice Cape
items.description: A cape made of ice seems to defeat the purpose ... but you do you!

items.name: Golden Finch Wings
items.description: Fly with grace and style.

items.name: NARS Holographic Backpack 3.0
items.description: Glow for it with a holographic, iridescent, multi-color backpack. Inspired by the iconic NARS Light Reflecting collection. Available in 1.0 and 3.0 sizes. Item created by 0929lego.

items.name: Sinister Cape
items.description: A sinister cape for sinister business.

items.name: Haunting Ghost Cape
items.description: A classic cape with a spooky style.

items.name: Mid-Summer Cape
items.description: A fashionable cape for summer nights.

items.name: Orinthian Cape
items.description: The strength required to fly in battle is great.  This cape helps the Orinthians with flight while they fight.

items.name: Sunfire Wings
items.description: The burning energy of the sun propels you forward.

items.name: Sakuranantoka - Blossom Bow And Quiver
items.description: Your bow is blessed by the spirit of spring herself, and your arrows always find their mark. This is an accessory though, ever-ready on your back.

items.name: Ralph Lauren Stadium Backpack
items.description: Atop an Americana color palette, Stadium icons and our signature Pony decorate this lightweight backpack.

items.name: Old Glory Wings
items.description: Oh say can you see / by the dawn's early light / These beautiful wings / of freedom's flight.

items.name: Exalted Wings of the Splintered Skies
items.description: Who will guard the skies if not for thee?

items.name: Glorious Eagle Wings
items.description: Prepare to fly to rocky cathedrals that reach to the sky with these glorious (and gigantic!) wings.

items.name: Harpy Wings
items.description: When a person in the ancient world suddenly disappeared from the earth, it was said that he had been carried off by the harpies.
